breaking_changes.detail: 91,128 of 219,869 trip_ids (41.4%) from the old feed are absent in the new feed. No stop_id, route_id, or agency_id was removed.
breaking_changes.note: All old shape_ids were also replaced (781 old → 857 new, 0 in common). This is consistent with STM's booking-period rollover (service_id prefixes 26J/26M → 26M/26U) where trip and shape IDs are regenerated each schedule period — but per the strict definition, any disappeared trip_id is breaking.

suspicious_changes.note: Small file of exception dates (exception_type=2 only in both); plausible for a new service period, but exceeds the threshold.

suspicious_changes.detail: 0 of 781 old shape_ids exist in the new feed (857 new shape_ids). Geometry continuity cannot be verified because no shape_id is shared between versions; row count grew 181,301 → 211,100 (+16.4%).
suspicious_changes.note: Flagged because complete shape namespace turnover prevents geometry validation, not because distortion was observed.

checks_passed.removed_required_field: none (trips.txt dropped note_fr/note_en, which are non-spec extension fields; new feed adds route_pattern_id, route_desc, directions.txt, route_patterns.txt)
checks_passed.changed_field_type_or_format: none; all 7,151,705 new stop_times have valid HH:MM:SS times
checks_passed.referential_integrity_new_feed: clean — all trips.route_id, trips.service_id, trips.shape_id, and stop_times.stop_id/trip_id resolve
checks_passed.enum_values: identical sets: route_type {1,3}, pickup_type {0,1}, location_type {0,1,2}, exception_type {2}, direction_id {0,1}, wheelchair {1,2}
checks_passed.feed_validity_window: new feed valid 2026-03-23 → 2026-08-23 (end date in future)
checks_passed.entity_count_deltas: stops +0.3%, routes +0.9% (added 768, 815), trips -7.6%, stop_times -10.0%, shapes +16.4%, translations -6.9% — all under 20% except calendar_dates
checks_passed.service_coverage_gap: none — 83 days of overlap (old end 2026-06-14, new start 2026-03-23)
checks_passed.headsign_route_name_bulk_change: 2.5% of common-trip headsigns, 2.6% of route_long_names (e.g. route 69 'Henri-Bourassa' → 'Gouin') — below bulk threshold
checks_passed.calendar_flip: no — both versions use calendar.txt + calendar_dates.txt
checks_passed.stop_time_ordering: 0 violations across all 7.15M rows (arrival ≥ prior departure, departure ≥ arrival, stop_sequence strictly increasing)
